reforms.description: A new Framework Law for Research and Technological Development aims to improve support and funding for R&D innovation programmes, encouraging links between the research community and businesses while expanding fiscal incentives to support R&D.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reform enhances R&D funding and collaboration, which is expected to boost innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but is not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in R&D funding and support mechanisms.
reforms.source_quote: A new Framework Law for Research and Technological Development, set to be finalized by end 2011, aims to encourage links between research community and businesses.

reforms.description: A new investment law (Law 3908/2011) aims to facilitate large investments by removing obstacles to business, setting a clear time schedule for project evaluation and approval, and providing tax incentives and financial support.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By streamlining investment processes and providing incentives, the law is expected to enhance business activity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The law has been implemented and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: This law represents a major reform in the investment landscape, significantly impacting business operations.
reforms.source_quote: The new investment law targets growth-enhancing investments, sets a clear time schedule for the evaluation and approval of projects, and allows for a better evaluation of projects and their outcomes.

reforms.description: The launching of ETEAN (Hellenic Entrepreneurship and Investment Fund) in early 2011 aims to support business investment plans by facilitating access to credit for small, medium, innovative, and export-oriented enterprises. Additionally, the creation of a unique Business Registry (GEMI) in 2011 streamlined the registration process for businesses, allowing most companies to complete all procedures in one day at a single contact point, significantly reducing bureaucratic hurdles.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These initiatives are designed to enhance access to finance and reduce bureaucratic barriers, fostering a more conducive environment for startups and innovative businesses.
reforms.status_evidence: Both initiatives have been implemented and are operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, these reforms are part of a broader strategy to enhance the startup ecosystem rather than a single structural overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: The launching of ETEAN aims to support business investment plans by facilitating access to credit of all enterprises, particularly small, medium, innovative and export oriented enterprises.

reforms.description: The Greek government has introduced a national export strategy aimed at improving the marketing of Greek products abroad, which includes developing a national brand and establishing an information network for exporters.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This strategy is expected to enhance the international competitiveness of Greek products, thereby supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy has been announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: While important, this strategy is more of a supportive measure rather than a major reform.
reforms.source_quote: The government has presented a national export strategy to improve the marketing of Greek products abroad.

reforms.description: A comprehensive reform in early 2011 opened up more than 150 closed professions, establishing the principle of professional freedom and removing the requirement for an administrative license to practice a profession.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This reform is expected to enhance competition and innovation in various sectors by allowing more professionals to enter the market.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been implemented and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the regulatory environment for professions.
reforms.source_quote: A comprehensive reform in early 2011 opened up more than 150 closed professions.
